# seo-manager-pro

> Lightweight SEO + AEO manager for Angular, React, Vue, and Vanilla JS SPAs.

This package exposes two separate managers:

- `SeoManager` — classic search engine optimization (Google, Bing, social previews)
- `AeoManager` — answer engine optimization for AI crawlers and LLM agents

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/mbsh-code/seo-manager-pro/blob/main/README.md): full API reference and examples
- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/seo-manager-pro)

## Quick API

```typescript
import { SeoManager, AeoManager, AeoPresets } from 'seo-manager-pro';

SeoManager.updateSeo({ title: '...', description: '...' });
AeoManager.updateAeo(AeoPresets.article({ title, description, url, author, publishedAt }));
AeoManager.generateLlmsTxt({ siteName, description, pages: [...] });
```

## SEO exports

- `SeoManager`, `SeoManagerPro` (alias)
- `SeoConfig`, `SchemaType`, `OpenGraphConfig`, `TwitterConfig`, and related types

## AEO exports

- `AeoManager` — `updateAeo()`, `resetAeo()`, `generateLlmsTxt()`, `buildPageSummaryJson()`
- `AeoPresets` — `article()`, `product()`, `faq()`, `howTo()`
- `generateLlmsTxt()` — standalone llms.txt generator
- `AeoConfig`, `PageSummary`, `LlmsTxtConfig`, `AiCrawlerBot`, and related types

## Optional

- [LICENSE.txt](https://github.com/mbsh-code/seo-manager-pro/blob/main/LICENSE.txt)
